steps.title: Mark the common pattern
steps.content: The first part names the popular narrative of Dust Bowl migrants moving to California. The study complicates that story by finding that migrants in the hardest-hit states merely relocated within the region.

steps.title: Avoid overstrong links
steps.content: Choice A implies a direct contradiction. Choice B makes the finding sound like an added supporting point. Choice C wrongly suggests the narrative caused the relocation. The remaining transition presents regional relocation as the more typical pattern found by researchers. The answer is D.
